examples: The hooting of a tugboat adds its grave and tender note.
In the little, brown tugboat, we can see the new industrial era starting.
The tugboat could draw extra power from the battery when full-power surges were needed.
The asteroid tugboat idea was developed by Schweickart and his team at Foundation B612.
The tugboat encircles the iceberg with a rope and nudges it next to the barge.
